pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take:
**Devin, look at me. LOOK AT ME. You drafted Bosnia.**

Listen, "Ghost Pepper," here you are, boasting a Spain team that's tearing apart minnows like Saudi Arabia, but drafting Bosnia — it's like you're trying to make an omelet with eggs that never even made it to the hen house. You're riding the coattails of a Spanish armada while clutching onto the USA and Norway like they're your teddy bears at night. Now, as for your boy Norway facing off against Gunner's Senegal in New Jersey — what do you expect, a snowstorm? Let me tell you something, "Bubba G," your reliance on France isn't fooling anyone; they're your one-trick pony while your dreams ride on the back of DR Congo. This matchup is going to test the mettle of these managers, and I'm betting "Ghost Pepper" eats "Bubba G" alive — because if we've learned anything from the 1994 World Cup era, it's that smart preparation and raw, undeniable grit always triumphs over sloppy draft picks. Mic drop, gentlemen.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe leads, but his 12% win chance screams 'fluke' louder than a vuvuzela.
